title: Viewing Commit History Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Git version history concepts.

questions.question: Which command is used to view your Git commit history?
Which Git command is used to see a condensed version of your commit history in a single line per commit?
Regarding Git version history, which command is used to see a graphical representation of your branches and merge history?
A situation where two or more transactions are waiting for each other to release a lock, resulting in a hang, is called a _______.
